scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields (name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources) and matches gold standard structure well. Includes additional valid optional fields.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'optional: true' field on relations (provides/requires/peers) is not a standard charmcraft.yaml field — relations don't have an 'optional' key. Also 'charm-binary-python-packages: []' under parts is unusual/questionable. Minor inaccuracies rather than major fabrications.
